scores.notes: Agent used legacy install+config-changed pattern rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent pattern. The install handler always sets ActiveStatus regardless of whether 'name' is empty, so the charm would show ActiveStatus on install even if name is unconfigured — a logical gap. config-changed correctly handles the WaitingStatus case, but misses the initial empty-name scenario. No hallucinated APIs, but the approach is not current best practice and fails an edge case in the spec.
